decisionPanels.title: Tonight's decision
decisionPanels.summary: Prioritise frictionless review-to-publish and vertical packaging this week; vendor and platform signals both point to speed + mobile-native output as growth levers.
actions: Adopt a 'review in place' workflow pilot: keep assets in LucidLink/iconik, eliminate side-channel transfers for at least one desk.
Ship a daily vertical package per major story (30-60s + 90-150s) with explicit retention hook in first 2s.
Add localisation experiment: subtitle-first variant + one dubbed variant for a high-probability explainer.

decisionPanels.title: Ops stack watch (iconik/LucidLink/Backlight)
decisionPanels.summary: LucidLink shipped Guest Access + Directory Management API; Backlight is reinforcing vertical/live automation. iconik release pages are anti-bot protected tonight, but indexed snippets indicate panel/plugin and ISG fixes worth direct verification in daylight.
actions: Validate LucidLink Guest Access against Guardian security policy (external reviewer flow, expiry, revoke paths).
Map Directory Management API to Launcher automation backlog (folder templates + permissions as code).
Run morning manual check of iconik panel/agent/ISG changelogs and log exact versions in MMR risk register.

decisionPanels.title: Audience growth signal
decisionPanels.summary: Official YouTube creator updates and Backlight/Wildmoka data converge on vertical-first discovery and faster social iteration loops.
actions: Use YouTube Shorts Trends page as daily ideation input for newsroom social producers.
Standardise auto-rezone/vertical framing checklist so each clip has 9:16-first variant.
Track completion rate + shares + saves as primary social health metrics, with CTR as secondary.

items.title: iconik release notes hub (manual verification required; anti-bot blocking observed)
iconik Panel snippet: Photoshop/Illustrator 2026 support + Premiere subclip support (from indexed release snippet)

Backlight resources/news: 2026 Media Stats + NAB 2026 + product update stream
YouTube Creator updates: Shorts Trends page global + new Shorts AI photo motion tool
Wildmoka: automated social publishing workflow patterns for live clipping
2026 Media Stats report: 117% growth in 9:16 publishing since 2024
Hybrid storage trend: 71% cloud / 29% on-prem + rising automation volumes

newItems.title: LucidLink January 2026 release (Guest Access + Directory Management API)
YouTube Shorts Trends page rollout (official update)

changes.summary: Shift from broad scanning to execution bias: review handoff friction, vertical-first packaging, and automation-ready folder governance are now the highest-leverage near-term bets.
